content: Can you write me the social media campaign I need to promote for the Hackaike hackathon event this using the Akaike accounts on social?

moves.text_span: al media campaign I need to promote for the Hackaike hackathon even

content:
Below is a suggested social media campaign plan for the Hackaike hackathon event using the Akaike accounts on various social media platforms:

1. Facebook:

- Announcement Post: Create an event on your Facebook page and share the announcement post to introduce the Hackaike hackathon, providing necessary details such as date, time, and registration link.

    Example: "Introducing the first-ever Hackaike hackathon! 💡👩‍💻👨‍💻 Join us in showcasing your coding skills and innovative ideas to win amazing prizes! Save the date and register now: [registration link] 🚀#HackaikeHackathon #codingchallenge"

- Countdown Posts: Post weekly or daily countdown updates to create excitement about the event and remind followers to register.

    Example: "Only 2 weeks left until the Hackaike hackathon! Register now to save your spot: [registration link] 🎉👨‍💻👩‍💻 #HackaikeHackathon #codingchallenge"

- Live Stream Announcement: Notify your followers the Hackaike hackathon will be live-streaming, sharing the streaming link.

    Example: "Watch the Hackaike hackathon event live on [date]! 🎥 Tune in as aspiring coders showcase their skills and compete for ultimate prizes. Streaming link: [streaming link] 🚀#HackaikeHackathon #livestream"

2. Twitter:

- Announcement Tweet: Post a tweet announcing the Hackaike hackathon event with key details.

    Example: "Get ready for the first-ever Hackaike hackathon! 🚀💻 Unleash your creativity and coding skills to win incredible prizes. Register now: [registration link] #HackaikeHackathon"

- Countdown Tweets: Tweet about the upcoming hackathon with updates on a daily or weekly basis.

    Example: "🚨 Only 7 days left until the #HackaikeHackathon! Register now to lock in your spot and compete against the brightest coders: [registration link]"

- Live Stream Tweet: Share a tweet announcing the live stream of the hackathon event.

    Example: "Join us online for the #HackaikeHackathon event live on [date]! Watch as coders compete and innovate before your eyes. 🎥 Streaming link: [streaming link]"

3. Instagram:

- Announcement Post: Share a visually engaging post announcing the Hackaike hackathon, including an eye-catching image, event date, and registration link in the caption.

    Example: "We're excited to announce the first-ever Hackaike hackathon! 🎉💡 Showcase your coding skills and innovative ideas to win fantastic prizes. Save the date and register now: [registration link] #HackaikeHackathon #codingchallenge"

- Instagram Stories: Share regular updates and reminders about the hackathon event through Instagram stories, and create a highlight to save all relevant stories.

    Example: "🚨 Last chance to register for the Hackaike hackathon! Don't miss out on the opportunity to compete and innovate with fellow coders. Register now: [registration link] #HackaikeHackathon #codingchallenge"

- Live Stream Announcement: Share an Instagram post and story notifying your followers about the live stream of the hackathon event.

    Example: "Watch the Hackaike hackathon event live on [date]! 🎥 Experience the excitement as coders compete to create game-changing solutions. Streaming link: [streaming link] #HackaikeHackathon #livestream"

Remember to engage with your audience, respond to comments or questions, and share posts from participants. Regularly updating your social media platforms will create buzz and encourage people to participate in the Hackaike hackathon event.

content: Not long ago, we stumbled upon an intriguing article, "Superhuman: What can AI do in 30 minutes?" by Wharton Professor Ethan Mollick. In this piece, Ethan asserts that he successfully executed an entire campaign from scratch in less than 30 minutes using solely AI tools. This piqued our interest, leading us to employ AI for our forthcoming Hackathon next month. While the outcomes we achieved needed some human refinement, they were nothing short of remarkable. In essence, our experience resonated with the sentiments shared by one of Ethan's commenters.

AI tools hold immense potential, yet they also possess the capacity to disrupt. We conducted a parallel experiment to showcase AI's prowess. In just 30 minutes, AI conducted market research, formulated a positioning document, crafted an email campaign, designed a website and logo, devised a social media campaign, and produced a video. The results were a testament to the remarkable capabilities of AI.

content:
Hey there, fellow tech enthusiasts!

You won't believe what we attempted recently at Akaike Technologies! We figured it was time to let AI flex its muscles and learn all about our company. So, we took the plunge and asked AI to educate itself on everything Akaike.

How did we do that? Well, we used Bing, a remarkable GPT-4 model connected to the internet. With its research capabilities, Bing dove headfirst into exploring our products and the market they're part of.

Stay tuned to see how our AI experiment unfolds and watch as Bing gets to know Akaike Technologies like never before! Happy reading!

Prompt Used: You are an expert site designer. You are creating the launch announcement page for the Hackaike hackathon event, outlined below. Create the following webpage. Make it an HTML page that I can run on my computer. List any additional assets I will need to make it work and where to put them. '

moves.text_span: ional assets I will need to make it work and where to put them. '

content:
Given that ChatGPT had already become well-versed in our campaign, we decided to rely on it for the initial stage of building our website.

To direct the AI, we provided the following instruction: "You are a skilled website designer tasked with crafting the launch announcement page for our Hackaike hackathon event. Create an HTML page that can be easily run on any computer. Additionally, please provide a list of the necessary assets and their corresponding placements on the webpage."

With this clear guidance, we set ChatGPT on a mission to create an amazing webpage for our event – and we were excited to see the outcome!

content: Rewrite as a human writer as an attractive conclusion for a newsletter blog, 'Though we were able to generate an impressive amount of content using various AI tools, we realised human intervention was still required especially while designing the website, the graphics and videos. The emails created by Generative AI though is commendable, it was still short of being refreshing. This means, that content creators must spend more time in researching the interests of their target audience and contributing their insights to AI generated content. A lot of efforts must be put in by humans to generate the right prompts for AI for it to produce stellar results. So, does this increase the workload of humans or frees up their space? Well, the amount of effort we put in to complete the task in 30 minutes shows that human efforts still remain the change, though the direction in which the efforts need to put is different.'

moves.text_span: of their target audience and contributing their insights to AI generated co
at content creators must spend more time in researching the inte
interests of their target audience and contributing their insight

content:
As we wrap up our AI adventure here at the newsletter, we'd like to share some key takeaways from our experiment with artificial intelligence. While we managed to produce a significant amount of content using various AI tools, we discovered that human interaction was still vital, particularly when designing the website, graphics, and videos. Furthermore, though the emails crafted by Generative AI were noteworthy, they were not quite as refreshing as we had hoped.

This brings us to an important realization: content creators must invest more time in understanding their target audience's interests and incorporating their insights into AI-generated content. It's crucial that humans put in the necessary effort to provide the right prompts to AI so that it can ultimately produce exceptional results.

So, does this approach increase our workload or liberate us from certain tasks? Surprisingly, our 30-minute race against time revealed that human effort remains the driving force behind change, but the focus of our efforts has shifted. As we embrace AI, the dynamic between artificial intelligence and human creativity continues to evolve, and it's a fascinating journey that's just beginning. Happy creating, and stay tuned for more AI adventures!
